artifacts.summary: Implementation of ValueNetwork MLP (2.78M params), encode_pattern_key (12-dim log1p+one-hot), FeatureNormalizer, ValueTrainer with curriculum+early-stopping, value_collate_fn, CLI script, and 63 unit tests all passing.

completion_data.completion_summary: Implemented a complete PyTorch MLP value network predicting derivation tree height from 12-dimensional PatternKey features. Core model (models/value.py) includes ValueNetwork with configurable architecture (~2.78M default params), encode_pattern_key with log1p normalization and one-hot encoding, and FeatureNormalizer. Training infrastructure (training/value_trainer.py) provides ValueTrainer with Adam+HuberLoss+CosineAnnealingLR, CurriculumSampler integration, early stopping, and checkpoint save/load. CLI script (scripts/train_value_network.py) with full argparse interface. All 63 unit tests pass in 2.4s.
